channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BHEL] Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd: Board Approves Joint Venture, Investment in BCGCL, and Mergers
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd (BHEL) announced the outcomes of its board meeting held on 19th March, 2026. The board approved a joint venture agreement with Titagarh Rail Systems Limited for comprehensive maintenance of Vande Bharat Sleeper Trains. BHEL also approved an investment of INR 3064.46 Crore in Bharat Coal Gasification and Chemicals Limited (BCGCL), its joint venture with Coal India Limited. Additionally, the board approved the merger of Heavy Electrical Equipment Plant (HEEP), Haridwar and Central Foundry Forge Plant (CFFP), Haridwar into a single unit, and the merger of Heavy Power Equipment Plant (HPEP), Hyderabad and Project Engineering & Systems Division (PE&SD), Hyderabad into a single unit.

  • BHEL approves joint venture with Titagarh Rail Systems Limited for Vande Bharat Sleeper Trains maintenance.
  • BHEL to invest INR 3064.46 Crore in BCGCL over four years.
  • Merger of HEEP, Haridwar and CFFP, Haridwar into a single unit.
  • Merger of HPEP, Hyderabad and PE&SD, Hyderabad into a single unit.
  • BHEL's equity contribution in BCGCL is at face value and done at arm’s length.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT HEAVY ELECTRICALS LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [VSTL] Promoter Group's Pratima Sandhir Acquires 0.01% Shares in Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
Pratima Sandhir, a Whole Time Director and a member of the Promoter Group of Vibhor Steel Tubes Limited, has acquired 1306 equity shares through an open market transaction. This acquisition constitutes 0.01% of the total paid-up capital of the company. The transaction took place on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited.

  • Pratima Sandhir, a Promoter Group member, acquires 1306 shares in Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd
  • The acquisition constitutes 0.01% of the total paid-up capital of the company
  • The transaction took place on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited
  • The shares were acquired via an open market transaction
  • The price per share was Rs. 109.2264

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NESCO] NESCO Ltd Achieves Revenue Milestone of 1,000 Crore in Current Financial Year
item.description:
NESCO Ltd has announced a significant milestone in its growth journey, having achieved a revenue of 1,000 crore in the current financial year. This achievement underscores the company's strong growth momentum and operational performance.

  • NESCO Ltd has reached a revenue milestone of 1,000 crore in the current financial year
  • This achievement reflects the company's robust growth and operational efficiency

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NESCO LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [VSTL] Promoter Vijay Kumar Kaushik Acquires 0.06% Shares in Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd
item.description:
Vijay Kumar Kaushik, Promoter and Director of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd, has acquired 10418 equity shares through open market transaction on March 18, 2026. This constitutes 0.06% of the total paid-up capital of the company.

  • Vijay Kumar Kaushik, a promoter and director of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd, acquired 10418 equity shares
  • The acquisition constitutes 0.06% of the total paid-up capital of the company
  • The acquisition was made through open market transaction on March 18, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SOLIMAC] Promoter Ashok Jivarajbhai Sheth Transfers Shares to Promoter Swati Hemendra Badani in Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Ashok Jivarajbhai Sheth, a promoter of Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd, has transferred 15,000 (0.33%) equity shares to Mrs. Swati Hemendra Badani, also a promoter of the company. The transfer took place on 17th March, 2026, through an off-market deal.

  • Ashok Jivarajbhai Sheth, a promoter of Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd, transferred 15,000 (0.33%) equity shares to Mrs. Swati Hemendra Badani, another promoter of the company.
  • The transfer occurred on 17th March, 2026, through an off-market deal.
  • Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd has an equity share capital of Rs. 4,54,21,760/- (45,42,176 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each).
  • The total voting capital of the company after the transfer is also Rs. 4,54,21,760/- (45,42,176 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each).
  • The transfer is disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOLITAIRE MACHINE TOOLS LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [SOLIMAC] Promoter Swati Hemendra Badani Acquires 0.33% Stake in Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd from Ashok Jivarajbhai Sheth
item.description:
Pursuant to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations 2011, Swati Hemendra Badani, a promoter of Solitaire Machine Tools Limited, has acquired 15,000 (0.33%) equity shares of the Target Company from Mr. Ashok Jivarajbhai Sheth, another promoter of the Target Company, by way of off-market inter-se transfer on 17th March, 2026.

  • Swati Hemendra Badani acquires 0.33% stake in Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd from Ashok Jivarajbhai Sheth.
  • The transaction took place on 17th March, 2026, through an off-market inter-se transfer.
  • Badani's acquisition increased her holding to 1.582% of the total share capital and total diluted share capital.
  • The total share capital and total diluted share capital of Solitaire Machine Tools Ltd remained unchanged.
  • The transaction did not involve any encumbrance or voting rights otherwise than by equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOLITAIRE MACHINE TOOLS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PUNJCOMMU] Punjab Communications Ltd Appoints New Managing Director Sh. Harsuhinder Pal Singh Brar, IAS
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Punjab Communications Ltd has appointed Sh. Harsuhinder Pal Singh Brar, IAS as the new Managing Director, effective from 10th March 2026. The appointment was made during the 238th meeting of the Board held on 19th March 2026. Sh. Harsuhinder Pal Singh Brar is a 2020 Batch IAS Officer, currently serving as Director, Higher Education, Punjab and Managing Director, Punjab Information & Communication Technology Corporation Limited (Punjab Infotech). He is related to other directors appointed by the Holding Company.

  • Punjab Communications Ltd has appointed a new Managing Director, Sh. Harsuhinder Pal Singh Brar, IAS.
  • The appointment is effective from 10th March 2026.
  • Sh. Harsuhinder Pal Singh Brar is a 2020 Batch IAS Officer.
  • He is currently serving as Director, Higher Education, Punjab and Managing Director, Punjab Information & Communication Technology Corporation Limited (Punjab Infotech).
  • Sh. Harsuhinder Pal Singh Brar is related to other directors appointed by the Holding Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB COMMUNICATIONS LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NBCC] NBCC (India) Ltd Secures Rs. 319.78Cr. Worth of Works
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NBCC (India) Limited has been awarded three works amounting to approximately Rs. 319.78 Crore. The works include the construction of an Executive Housing Complex for Oil India Limited at Duliajan, Assam (Turnkey Basis), construction of major bridges over River Hari and River Luva in the State of Meghalaya along Indo-Bangladesh Border (IBB), and dedicated spaces for start-up incubation centre and centre for public policy in Chandragupt Institute of Management, Patna. These works are in the normal course of business of the Company.

  • NBCC (India) Ltd has been awarded works worth approximately Rs. 319.78 Crore.
  • The works include the construction of an Executive Housing Complex for Oil India Limited at Duliajan, Assam.
  • Two other works involve the construction of major bridges in Meghalaya and dedicated spaces for start-up incubation centre and centre for public policy in Chandragupt Institute of Management, Patna.
  • These works are in the normal course of business of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NBCC (India) Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [TCI] Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Holdings Acquires 0.0013% Stake in Transport Corporation of India Ltd
item.description:
Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Holdings Ltd has acquired 1,035 equity shares of Transport Corporation of India Limited on March 18, 2026. This represents 0.0013% of the total share capital of Transport Corporation of India Ltd. The acquisition was made through the open market.

  • Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Holdings Ltd acquires 1,035 equity shares of Transport Corporation of India Ltd
  • The acquisition represents 0.0013% of the total share capital of Transport Corporation of India Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through the open market
  • The total share capital of Transport Corporation of India Ltd is INR 15,34,87,594 consisting of 7,67,43,797 equity shares
  • The acquisition was made on March 18, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSPORT CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [NBCC] NBCC to Execute Rs. 5,800 Crore Rajasthan Mandapam & Allied Infrastructure Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NBCC, a leading public sector enterprise, is set to execute a massive infrastructure project worth Rs. 5,800 crore near Jaipur International Airport. The project, named Rajasthan Mandapam and Allied Infrastructure, will be developed on more than 90 acre of land and will have a total built-up area of more than 94.53 lakh sq.ft. The project includes an iconic convention centre, grand expo halls, Global Capability Centres (GCCs) & IT/ITES Office Spaces, Hotels, Retail facilities & Housing, a Natural History Museum, Riverfront public spaces, Unity Mall, and Fintech plaza. NBCC will implement the project through a self-financing model, ensuring financial sustainability while maintaining world-class standards. The project is expected to have a significant economic and social impact on the region.

  • NBCC to execute a Rs. 5,800 crore infrastructure project near Jaipur International Airport.
  • The project includes an iconic convention centre, grand expo halls, GCCs, IT/ITES Office Spaces, Hotels, Retail facilities & Housing, a Natural History Museum, Riverfront public spaces, Unity Mall, and Fintech plaza.
  • NBCC to implement the project through a self-financing model.
  • The project is expected to have a significant economic and social impact on the region.
  • The Rajasthan Mandapam Convention Centre will be a world-class, multi-scale facility capable of hosting international conventions, exhibitions, cultural performances, and high-level events.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NBCC (India) Ltd | Category: New Launch
